root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Plan-cache/lease/background refresh can introduce timing-dependent behavior. This PR stabilizes it by: planner: fix the unstable test `TestPrepareCacheChangingParamType `.
